name: Maruka Corporation
summary: Maruka Corporation, a trading company, engages in the import, export, and sale of industrial and construction machineries in the United States, Asia, and internationally. The company's Industrial Machinery division provides machine tools, forming machinery, washing machines, injection molding machinery, welding machinery, surface treatment equipment, production machinery, bearings, hydraulic equipment, industrial robots, environmental equipment, water chillers, mold temperature controllers, environment-related products, and food machinery. This division serves automobile, consumer electronics, agricultural equipment, railroad, food machinery, airplane, medical, and energy-related industries. Its Construction Machinery division sells and rents construction machines for harbor and construction machinery industries. The company was formerly known as Maruka Machinery Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Maruka Corporation in April 2019. Maruka Corporation was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
